name: Peanut Blossoms
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Creamy or Crunchy Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat shortening and peanut butter until well blended.
4. Add sugars; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
6. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; gradually add to peanut butter mixture.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
9. Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Immediately place a chocolate piece on top of each cookie and press down so the cookie cracks around the edges.
12. Remove from the cookie sheet to a wire rack.
13. Cool completely.
YIELD: about 4 dozen cookies
